picks.title: Third Annual Cinco de Mayo Festival
picks.why: Annual Cinco de Mayo Festival with parade, live entertainment, and vendors—don't miss this yearly South Bay tradition.

picks.title: Les Miserables (Touring)
picks.venue: San Jose Center for the Performing Arts
picks.why: Les Misérables touring production at San Jose Center—once-a-year Broadway spectacle, iconic musical everyone should experience.

picks.title: The Geary Act Project: AANHPI Heritage Month
picks.why: Local historian Connie Young Yu on Chinese exclusion laws—rare, free educational event on Bay Area history that matters.

picks.title: Friends of the Library Book Sale
picks.why: Friends of the Library Book Sale [Sun, May 3 11:00 AM]—deep discounts on used books, great for readers and budget-conscious browsers.

picks.title: SJSU Theatre Presents: Kingdom of Cards
picks.why: SJSU Theatre's Kingdom of Cards [Sun, May 3 2:00 PM]—free Tagore adaptation, superb local theater you won't see elsewhere.
